name: Colorado Potato Supremes
recipeIngredient: 8 teaspoons whole seed or grainy mustard
2 tablespoons finely chopped chives or green onion tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Prick the potatoes in 5 or 6 places with the tines of a fork.
3. Bake the potatoes for 50-60 minutes, until tender and skins are crisp.
4. Cut the potatoes crosswise into 4 thick slices.
5. Scoop out a small amount of potato from the center of each slice using a melon baller or small spoon.
6. Season the hollowed-out centers with salt and pepper.
7. Spread 1/2 teaspoon mustard on each center.
8. Place one piece of Brie cheese in each center.
9. Sprinkle chopped chives or green onion tops over the Brie.
10. Place the potato supremes on baking sheets.
11. Bake for 15-20 minutes, until the cheese has melted and browned in spots.
12. Serve warm.
Makes 16 appetizers.
